name: Social: Make Punchier

description.en: Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.
description.es: Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.
description.fr: Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.
description.ro: Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.
description.it: Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.

bot: Use this when the user wants more energy and directness in a post. Tighten sentences, lead with the strongest idea, remove hedging language.
